title: Signature-scoring CLI on user-supplied open data
context: A research-only CLI that scores the reproduced EWSR1-FLI1 signature on user-supplied OPEN data, and refuses non-open or clinical use (PLAN backlog/M4). The refusal behaviour is a binding guardrail, not a feature toggle. Binding guardrails: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/biobanks) and identifiable patient data are out of scope; COSMIC/OncoKB/MSigDB-restricted are recipe-reference only; no clinical/diagnostic/prognostic/treatment language; research-only, not medical advice; provenance on every assertion.
objective: Build a signature-scoring CLI that operates only on user-supplied open data and refuses non-open/clinical inputs, with research-only framing.
acceptanceCriteria: CLI scores the reproduced signature on user-supplied open expression data with a documented one-command run.
CLI refuses (with a clear message) non-open or clinical/diagnostic use; the refusal path is tested.
Output labelled research-only; no clinical interpretation produced.
Commit is DCO signed-off; no secrets bundled.
output: A pull request adding the research-only signature-scoring CLI (refuses non-open/clinical use).
